cheats: Low gravity glitch for faster travel

builds/guides: Each colossus weak point locations and attack patterns
bosses: Quadrumanus (Colossus #1) - Shot in back while climbing
Phidias (#3) - Shoot glowing markings on legs
Chiron (#11) - Shoot back foot, avoid energy blast
Malus (#16, Final) - Use light arrows, climb and stab
All 16 colossi have unique patterns and weak spots
